posts.author: Mayank.mail
posts.text: After 2 months offtake has started improving, and stock being at 200DMA might take support now.. Offtake - May month saw an increase of 2.2% while June has seen sharper rise of 7.5%; taking the cumulative growth for the Apr-June 26 quarter to 3.5% over last year Another change is the increased focus on R&D investments, 23-24 was 61Cr, 24-25 jumped to 261 (4X), and is expected to do 1900Cr till FY30, average of 400Cr each year..

posts.author: bbbhutra
posts.text: Bottomline has been stagnant for last 3 years. I wonder if there are any triggers which suggest growth beyond 10% for it in the next 3 years. Wondering if PPFAS invested for growth or to cushion portfolio against downfall.
